calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne Thomas for Anna Schutter.

Mr. Thomas stated that the issue had to do with the Court recognizing the disclaimer, that all of the U.S. assets were placed in the Trust in 1998, that the Denmark assets were handled outside of the Trust and that the Trustee relied on the advice of Counsel in Denmark. In addition, he stated that the asset would have been treated as a business at a 35% tax rate, that the money in Denmark was now here in Wells Fargo Bank, that it will create tax issues, that the Children were all aware the the money will go to the Mother and that she will put the money in the Survivor's Trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Continued To Jun-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Continued To May-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authority To Administer Decedents Estate Under The Independent Administration Of Estates Act
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne H. Thomas Jr. for Anna Belle Schutter.

Mr. Thomas stated that there was property in Denmark which was transferred to the Estate, that Denmark does not recognize the Trust disclaimer, that the action of the Trustee cannot invalidate the Trust, and that he's run into problems dealing with the banks in Denmark. The Court inquired as to whether there was any authority for the position counsel was taking. Mr. Thomas responded as set forth on the record. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Scott Hughes, CSR# 12365. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Continued To Sep-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
